## Validation

- [ ] `uv run python scripts/validate_skills.py`
- [ ] `uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] Changed skills were exercised on representative requests
- [ ] Added scripts were run on representative inputs
- [ ] Third-party content has compatible licensing and attribution
